product_overview: The product is a backend API for managing product records. It provides endpoints for retrieving product data and is built using TypeScript, Express, Node.js, and MongoDB.
core_goals: Expose a reliable API for product data retrieval
Support scalable backend operations for product-related data
Provide clear success and error responses for API consumers

features.name: Products API
features.description: Allows clients to retrieve product records through a REST endpoint.
user_flows: GET /api/products -> Receive 200 with an array of product objects
GET /api/products with malformed request parameters -> Receive 4xx error response indicating invalid request
GET /api/products when no products exist -> Receive 200 with an empty array
